narrative:
Union South A (precinct in Clinton County) has 399 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.1 percentage points.
